user.title: Marstek Local API
user.description: Device setup for the local API

discovery.title: Discovered devices
discovery.description: Select a discovered Marstek device or choose manual entry

manual.title: Manual configuration
manual.description: Enter the IP address of your Marstek device

discovery_confirm.title: Discovered Marstek device
discovery_confirm.description: A Marstek device ({name}) was discovered on your network. Do you want to add it to Home Assistant?

abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to discovered device

init.title: Marstek Local API options
init.description: Select what you want to configure

scan_interval.title: Communication timings and thresholds
scan_interval.description: Adjust how frequently Home Assistant polls the device and how it handles communication issues.

data_description.scan_interval: Base polling interval for real-time sensors (ES, EM, PV)
data_description.command_timeout: How long to wait for a device response before retrying
data_description.command_max_attempts: How many times to retry a command before giving up
data_description.command_min_interval: Minimum time (in seconds) between two consecutive frames sent to the battery. Increase if the device struggles with rapid commands (e.g. during mode changes). Default: 0.5 s.
data_description.stale_data_threshold: How old data can be (in seconds) before entities show as unavailable. Recommended: at least twice the slow update interval (default: 2 × 1200 = 2400 s). Default: 3600 s (1 hour).
data_description.medium_interval_secs: How often battery status and operating mode are polled (Bat.GetStatus, ES.GetMode). Default: 300 s (5 min).
data_description.slow_interval_secs: How often static device info is polled (device, Wi-Fi, BLE). Default: 1200 s (20 min).
data_description.poll_mode: When enabled, Home Assistant polls the device for operating mode via ES.GetMode on the medium interval. Disable if you observe unexpected configuration resets when ES.GetMode is polled. Default: enabled.

battery_settings.title: Battery settings
battery_settings.description: These values are informational only and do not configure the device. Set them to match what you have configured in the Marstek app.

data_description.dod_percent: Maximum percentage of rated capacity the battery can use (e.g. 80 means it stops at 20% SOC). Must match your Marstek app setting — this does not change the device configuration.

rename_device.title: Rename device
rename_device.description: Update how the device appears in Home Assistant

remove_device.title: Remove device
remove_device.description: Select a device to remove from this integration

add_device.title: Add device
add_device.description: Select a discovered device or choose manual entry

add_device_manual.title: Manual device entry
add_device_manual.description: Enter the connection details for the device

error.cannot_remove_last_device: At least one device must remain configured
